description:
The image displays four company logos horizontally aligned on a white background.
1.  The first logo, "e-geos", features grey text with a red triangular accent over the "e" and a red "o", followed by the red tagline "AN ASI/TELESPAZIO COMPANY".
2.  The second logo, "TRE ALTAMIRA", has a blue abstract wavy graphic above blue text "TRE ALTAMIRA", with the blue tagline "A CLS Group Company" below.
3.  The third logo, "NORCE", consists of blue text where the letter "O" is replaced by a stylized blue asterisk or starburst symbol.
4.  The fourth logo, "GAF AG", shows grey text for "GAF" and red underlined text for "AG", followed by the grey tagline "an e-GEOS (ASI / Telespazio) Company".
